summary: Comprehensive testing of ProfitPilot new features completed. All backend APIs (Export, Recurring, Stats) pass 100%. Frontend navigation, pages, and CSV download functionality all working correctly. Dashboard charts render properly.
passed_tests: Backend: Login API returns token (200)
Backend: GET /api/recurring returns success:true with data array (200)
Backend: POST /api/recurring creates recurring transaction (201)
Backend: GET /api/export/transactions returns CSV (200)
Backend: GET /api/export/invoices returns CSV (200)
Backend: GET /api/export/clients returns CSV (200)
Backend: GET /api/export/report returns CSV (200)
Backend: GET /api/transactions/stats returns monthlyData array (200)
Backend: Export with type filter works (200)
Backend: Export with date filter works (200)
Backend: Export with status filter works (200)
Frontend: Login form works with demo credentials
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all 4 KPI cards
Frontend: Dashboard shows Monthly Income vs Expenses bar chart
Frontend: Dashboard shows Net Profit Trend line chart
Frontend: Dashboard shows Expense Breakdown pie chart
Frontend: Dashboard shows Income Sources pie chart
Frontend: Sidebar shows Recurring navigation item
Frontend: Sidebar shows AI Insights navigation item
Frontend: Sidebar shows Data Export navigation item
Frontend: /recurring page loads with 'Recurring Transactions' title
Frontend: /recurring page shows 'Add Recurring' button
Frontend: /recurring page displays recurring transactions list
Frontend: /insights page loads with 'AI Financial Insights' title
Frontend: /insights page shows 'Generate Insights' button
Frontend: /export page loads with 'Data Export' title
Frontend: /export page shows all 4 export buttons (Transactions, Invoices, Clients, Financial Report)
Frontend: CSV download works - transactions-2026-04-01.csv downloaded successfully
Frontend: Export Complete toast notification appears after download
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Monthly subscription recurring transaction during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Data Export, Recurring Transactions, Dashboard Charts, AI Insights page) are fully functional. Backend uses hybrid FastAPI + Node.js architecture. Export endpoints return CSV (not JSON). Login works with demo@profitpilot.com / demo123. The recurring transaction created during testing (TEST_Monthly subscription) can be cleaned up.
